attackOnTitanRevolutionBeginnerGuide.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Beginner Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionBeginnerGuide.intro: Attack on Titan Revolution is built around ODM movement, Titan combat, mission grinding, family rolls, skill-tree progression, and raid rewards. Start with movement and missions first, then use codes, upgrades, Families, and Perks to move into harder content.
attackOnTitanRevolutionBeginnerGuide.tipsLabel: Attack on Titan Revolution Beginner Priorities

steps.title: Start from the official Attack on Titan Revolution experience
steps.description: Choose one character slot, customize your character, roll a starting Family, and learn where quests, inventory, equipment, market, regiment, battle pass, and ranking menus live.
keyActions: Choose one character slot to progress first
Check daily, weekly, main, and side quests
Use codes early for Spins, Emperor Keys, and boost potions

steps.title: Learn Attack on Titan Revolution ODM Gear control
steps.description: Practice Q and E hooks, hold Space while grappling to boost with gas, double-tap Space for impulse movement, and reload blades before long Titan fights.
keyActions: Practice left and right hooks separately
Use gas boost while approaching Titan weak spots
Keep enough gas for the full kill route

steps.title: Use Attack on Titan Revolution Titan weak spots
steps.description: Practice clean approaches on Titans, aim toward the upper body or nape, keep enough speed for the slash, and reset your angle when a Titan turns or grabs.
keyActions: Approach from the shoulder or head angle
Keep enough speed before slashing
Reposition before fighting large Titan groups

steps.title: Run Attack on Titan Revolution Missions before Raids
steps.description: Use lower Mission difficulties to build XP, Gold, gear progress, quest completions, and combat confidence before entering phase-based Raid content.
keyActions: Start with easier mission difficulties
Clear quests while farming Gold and XP
Use map boosts such as Luck, EXP, or Gold

steps.title: Upgrade Attack on Titan Revolution gear evenly
steps.description: Prioritize practical combat upgrades such as Damage, Speed, Control, Range, Gas, Durability, Crit Chance, and Crit Damage while keeping your overall gear grade moving upward.
keyActions: Upgrade Damage early for cleaner Titan kills
Improve Speed and Control for reliable ODM routes
Keep Gas and Durability ready for longer missions

steps.title: Spend Attack on Titan Revolution skill points around your build
steps.description: Family skills are high priority, while ODM players can build toward strong offense tools and Support utility such as Target Acquisition for better nape targeting.
keyActions: Unlock important Family skills first
Use Offense skills to speed up Titan clears
Use Support tools when accuracy and team utility matter

steps.title: Understand Attack on Titan Revolution Families before rerolling
steps.description: Families affect stats, skills, Titan shifting, perk slots, raid damage, party bonuses, and build direction, so spend Spins with a clear target.
keyActions: Save Spins for strong Families before major rerolls
Use high-value codes before rolling
Keep top Families instead of rerolling blindly

steps.title: Move into Attack on Titan Revolution Raids and Update 4 content
steps.description: After your build is stable, push into harder raids, Waves mode, Winter Event farming, and Colossal Titan Raid preparation for cosmetics, serums, artifacts, and perks.
keyActions: Enter raids after gear and skills are ready
Use healing and defensive options for waves of Titans
Prepare for Prestige-gated endgame content

quickTips: Attack on Titan Revolution codes are most valuable before Family rerolls and raid preparation.
Attack on Titan Revolution ODM movement matters before raw damage because clean Titan angles decide mission speed.
Attack on Titan Revolution Families and Perks should support the same build goal instead of competing priorities.
Attack on Titan Revolution Raids become smoother after Missions, gear upgrades, and skill-tree basics are stable.

attackOnTitanRevolutionFamilyTierList.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Family Tier List

attackOnTitanRevolutionPerksTierList.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Perks Tier List
attackOnTitanRevolutionPerksTierList.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Perks Tier List
attackOnTitanRevolutionPerksTierList.subtitle: Compare Body, Offense, Defense, and Support perks by strength, role fit, and practical use. Use this tier list to decide what to equip, craft, enhance, or keep for late-game builds.
attackOnTitanRevolutionPerksTierList.intro: Perks in Attack on Titan Revolution shape your build more than most early upgrades. Mythic perks usually define a playstyle, while lower-rarity perks can still fill important gaps for damage, durability, healing, cooldowns, and raid support.
attackOnTitanRevolutionPerksTierList.recommendedUseLabel: Recommended Attack on Titan Revolution use

tiers.summary: Build-defining Mythic perks that fit top-end ODM, Shifter, raid, or support setups.

perks.name: Heavenly Restriction
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A high-risk, high-reward perk that boosts overall ODM and Titan Shifter performance while limiting skill usage. It is strongest for players who can survive with fewer active tools and want raw stat scaling.
perks.recommended_use: Use it when your build already has strong control, movement, and survivability from gear, family, memories, or teammates.

perks.name: Kengo
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A premier damage perk for ODM-focused players, giving major damage and blade-related value. It is especially useful when you want faster titan clearing without relying only on Shifter uptime.
perks.recommended_use: Pair with damage-oriented offense nodes, critical bonuses, and perks that improve durability or resource efficiency.

perks.name: Black Flash
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Rewards speed and aggressive movement with stronger critical output and Phantom dash utility. It fits players who can keep momentum and consistently strike weak points.
perks.recommended_use: Use with fast ODM setups, crit-focused memories, and playstyles that constantly reposition around titan napes.

perks.name: Art of War
perks.why_it_ranks_here: One of the strongest choices for Shifter-centered builds because it boosts Titan Shifter attack speed and damage. It is especially valuable when your build revolves around staying effective during transformation windows.
perks.recommended_use: Equip on Shifter families and raid builds that need higher boss damage during transformation uptime.

perks.name: Founder's Blessing
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Improves Shifter consistency through extra shifting value, awakening support, aggro range, and broad Shifter stat bonuses. It is one of the best perks for players who want their Titan form to carry more of the run.
perks.recommended_use: Use in raid teams, Shifter farming, and builds that want more frequent or more reliable transformations.

perks.name: Maximum Firepower
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A top-tier Thunder Spear perk that improves spear count, spear speed, Titan Shifter stats, and recoil handling. It is ideal for players who build around explosive burst rather than blade-only damage.
perks.recommended_use: Use when your gear and memories already support Thunder Spear damage, ammo, or cooldown efficiency.

perks.name: Font of Inspiration
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A premium team perk because it improves orders, flares, cooldown flow, and ally defensive value. It is one of the clearest support choices for coordinated raids.
perks.recommended_use: Best on a dedicated support player who actively uses orders, red or black flares, and team timing.

perks.name: Immortal
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A defensive anchor that improves health, damage reduction, and injury resistance. It is especially useful when pushing harder content where mistakes can end the run.
perks.recommended_use: Use while learning Aberrant raids, solo farming, or running builds that cannot afford frequent injuries.

perks.name: Soulfeed
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Gives gas and health value from kills while helping identify titans. It is excellent for longer missions and farming routes where constant sustain matters.
perks.recommended_use: Pair with high-kill ODM builds, solo routes, and mission farming where you can repeatedly chain titan kills.

perks.name: Tatsujin
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong movement and handling perk that improves the core feel of ODM gameplay. It helps both farming and combat by making positioning easier.
perks.recommended_use: Use if your build needs better control, range, speed, or gas value rather than pure damage.

perks.name: Unwavering Belief
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A team-oriented Mythic support perk that reduces party skill cooldowns through kills while increasing the user's personal cooldown burden. It is strongest when teammates can capitalize on the cooldown support.
perks.recommended_use: Best for coordinated raid groups where one player is intentionally built as a support engine.

tiers.summary: Very strong perks that support late-game builds but are usually less build-defining than SS-tier Mythics.

perks.name: Eviscerate
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong offensive option for players who want more reliable kill speed before or alongside Mythic perks.
perks.recommended_use: Keep it for damage builds until a stronger Mythic offense perk replaces it.

perks.name: Font of Vitality
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A useful sustain perk that fits safer progression and support-oriented play.
perks.recommended_use: Use when your team lacks healing or when you are pushing content with frequent injury risk.

perks.name: Gear Master
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong all-purpose gear perk that improves the consistency of ODM gameplay.
perks.recommended_use: Equip when you need a balanced perk for movement and mission consistency.

perks.name: Indefatigable
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A good defensive perk for surviving longer fights and reducing the punishment from extended encounters.
perks.recommended_use: Use for players still building consistency in Severe or Aberrant content.

perks.name: Peerless Focus
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong offensive support perk for players who can consistently land high-value hits.
perks.recommended_use: Pair with crit-focused offense nodes and fast ODM play.

perks.name: Sixth Sense
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Useful for staying alive and avoiding bad engagements, especially in messy missions or raids.
perks.recommended_use: Equip when survival and awareness matter more than maximum damage.

perks.name: Unparalleled Strength
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A reliable damage perk that works across many non-specialized builds.
perks.recommended_use: Use as a strong damage option before obtaining stronger Mythic offense perks.

tiers.summary: Good perks for progression, specialized builds, or filling a missing stat gap.

perks.name: Experimental Shells
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Useful for explosive playstyles, though usually less complete than Maximum Firepower.
perks.recommended_use: Use on Thunder Spear builds while progressing toward stronger spear-focused perks.

perks.name: Heightened Vitality
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A practical defensive perk that gives newer or mid-game players more room for mistakes.
perks.recommended_use: Equip when raid or mission deaths are slowing progression.

perks.name: Invincible
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong safety perk when survivability matters more than speed.
perks.recommended_use: Use while learning boss mechanics or pushing higher difficulty.

perks.name: Mutilate
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Helpful for controlling titans through limb pressure and improving kill setup.
perks.recommended_use: Use in missions where disabling titans is valuable.

perks.name: Reckless Abandon
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A useful offensive perk for players who want more damage and are comfortable taking risks.
perks.recommended_use: Use only when your movement and survival are already stable.

perks.name: Solo
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A strong situational perk for players who mainly clear content without a full team.
perks.recommended_use: Equip for solo mission farming rather than coordinated raid support.

perks.name: Stalwart Durability
perks.why_it_ranks_here: A good defensive filler for players who need more consistency.
perks.recommended_use: Use when survivability is the main blocker.

perks.name: Trauma Battery
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Provides practical defensive value in messy fights where injuries are common.
perks.recommended_use: Use if your build regularly takes injuries but can continue fighting.

tiers.summary: Usable progression perks. Keep them early, but replace them once stronger Epic, Legendary, or Mythic perks are available.

perks.name: Adrenaline
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Can help in early progression but is not a long-term build centerpiece.
perks.recommended_use: Use temporarily until you roll stronger movement or defensive perks.

perks.name: Fully Stocked
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Useful when resupply issues are slowing your runs.
perks.recommended_use: Good for early missions before you have better sustain tools.

perks.name: Protection
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Simple defensive value, but outclassed by higher-rarity defensive perks.
perks.recommended_use: Use while learning titan patterns and replace later.

perks.name: Siphoning
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Useful for keeping runs going, especially before stronger healing perks are available.
perks.recommended_use: Use in farming routes with frequent kills.

perks.name: Speedy
perks.why_it_ranks_here: Helps early movement but does not provide enough late-game value alone.
perks.recommended_use: Use until a stronger Body or ODM-focused perk replaces it.

attackOnTitanRevolutionSkillTreeGuide.name: Guia da Árvore de Habilidades de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionSkillTreeGuide.title: Guia da Árvore de Habilidades de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionSkillTreeGuide.subtitle: Aprenda como gastar pontos de habilidade, quais habilidades ativas desbloquear primeiro e como cada árvore suporta diferentes objetivos. Este guia separa dano de ODM, sobrevivência, suporte de tempo de recarga, habilidades de Families e rotas de Titan Shifters.
attackOnTitanRevolutionSkillTreeGuide.intro: As Árvores de Habilidades são o seu principal sistema de progressão de personagem após o nivelamento básico. Nós circulares são melhorias passivas, nós de diamante são habilidades ativas que você pode equipar, e as redefinições custam 999 gemas, reembolsando seus pontos de habilidade e ouro gastos.
attackOnTitanRevolutionSkillTreeGuide.detailsLabel: Detalhes de Attack on Titan Revolution

steps.title: Entenda como as Árvores de Habilidades funcionam
steps.goal: Saiba o que cada tipo de nó faz antes de gastar pontos.
details: Os pontos de habilidade são ganhos ao subir de nível e gastos em diferentes árvores.
Nós circulares são atualizações de atributos passivos, como dano, durabilidade, redução de tempo de recarga, vida ou resistência a ferimentos.
Nós de diamante desbloqueiam habilidades ativas que devem ser equipadas em seus slots de habilidade.
Uma redefinição da árvore de habilidades custa 999 gemas e reembolsa pontos de habilidade e ouro.
recommended_for: jogadores que planejam uma redefinição total de build

steps.title: Comece com Ataque se o seu objetivo for uma limpeza mais rápida
steps.goal: Melhorar o dano de ODM, produção de crítico, valor da lâmina e habilidades de ataque ativas.

default_path: +5% de Duração do Balanço ou +6% de Raio de Explosão
+6% de Durabilidade da Lâmina ou +6 de Munição de Lança
damage_path: +16% de Duração do Balanço ou +24% de Raio de Explosão
+10% de Durabilidade da Lâmina ou Chance de Conservação

key_skills.name: Hand Grinder
key_skills.use_case: Escapa automaticamente de uma agarrada de titã ao custo de um segmento de lâmina.

key_skills.name: Blade Dance
key_skills.use_case: Impulsiona em direção ao seu cursor e realiza um corte, útil para movimentação agressiva de ODM.

key_skills.name: Drill Thrust
key_skills.use_case: Gira para frente em direção ao cursor e causa dano aos titãs ao contato.

key_skills.name: Rising Slash
key_skills.use_case: Lança para cima e corta ao redor do jogador.

key_skills.name: Torrential Steel
key_skills.use_case: Gira por vários segundos e causa dano de contato.

key_skills.name: Lethal Tempo
key_skills.use_case: Mata um titã próximo e pode encadear em alvos adicionais, mas quebra forçadamente uma lâmina.

recommended_path: Desbloqueie Hand Grinder cedo para segurança.
Pegue Blade Dance para movimentação e engajamento mais rápido com titãs.
Escolha Drill Thrust ou Rising Slash dependendo se prefere explosão direcionada ou cobertura de corte vertical.
Construa em direção ao Torrential Steel para limpeza sustentada ou Lethal Tempo para pressão de abates em cadeia.
Adicione nós críticos quando conseguir atingir nucas e pontos fracos consistentemente.
best_for: jogadores que querem maior velocidade de abate

steps.title: Use Defesa quando mortes, ferimentos ou agarradas estiverem bloqueando o progresso
steps.goal: Aumentar a vida, reduzir o dano, resistir a ferimentos e sobreviver a conteúdos mais difíceis.

default_path: +15% de Redução de Chance de Ferimento

key_skills.name: Counter
key_skills.use_case: Usado no momento do impacto antes de ser atordoado para aleijar um membro do titã.

key_skills.name: Emergency Relocation
key_skills.use_case: Consome a vida atual para curar um ferimento e concede resistência temporária a ferimentos e chance crítica.

key_skills.name: Hardy Counter
key_skills.use_case: Permite escapar de uma agarrada e mata o titã.

key_skills.name: Iron Resolve
key_skills.use_case: Concede redução de dano e ganha valor extra quando ferido.

recommended_path: Pegue vida inicial e resistência a ferimentos se estiver morrendo antes de terminar as missões.
Escolha Counter ou Hardy Counter se as agarradas forem o problema principal.
Use Emergency Relocation quando a recuperação de ferimentos for mais importante que o dano bruto.
Construa em Resistência para aprender Raids e Sobrevivência para corridas solo mais seguras.

steps.title: Use Suporte quando sua equipe precisar de cura, reabastecimento, valor de sinalizadores ou ordens
steps.goal: Melhorar a utilidade da equipe, fluxo de tempo de recarga, cura e janelas de dano coordenado.

default_path: +10% de Durabilidade ou +5% de Chance de Conservação
commander_path: +35% de Redução de Tempo de Recarga
+25% de Redução de Chance de Ferimento

key_skills.name: Bandages
key_skills.use_case: Fornece duas bandagens que curam a vida e tratam ferimentos nos membros.

key_skills.name: Red Flare
key_skills.use_case: Marca até cinco titãs dentro do alcance e faz com que recebam mais dano e pressão crítica.

key_skills.name: Advanced Medic
key_skills.use_case: Melhora a cura das bandagens e expande o tratamento de ferimentos.

key_skills.name: Acoustic Shells
key_skills.use_case: Atrai a atenção dos titãs e pode ajudar a forçar a soltura de jogadores agarrados.

key_skills.name: Portable Resupply
key_skills.use_case: Fornece reabastecimentos para lutas prolongadas e missões longas.

key_skills.name: Order Advance
key_skills.use_case: Aumenta a velocidade e o controle de ODM dos aliados por uma janela curta.

key_skills.name: Master Medic
key_skills.use_case: Melhora a regeneração, o tratamento de ferimentos e o valor total das bandagens.

key_skills.name: Black Flare
key_skills.use_case: Marca mais titãs em um alcance maior com dano e vulnerabilidade crítica mais fortes.

key_skills.name: Resourceful
key_skills.use_case: Reduz o tempo de recarga do reabastecimento e aumenta a contagem de recarga.

key_skills.name: Order Rage
key_skills.use_case: Aumenta o dano da equipe e o dano crítico.

recommended_path: Pegue Bandages cedo se sua equipe não tiver cura.
Use Red Flare ou Black Flare para janelas de dano em equipe.
Escolha Portable Resupply e Resourceful para lutas longas ou consistência em Raids.
Construa como Comandante se quiser redução de tempo de recarga, ordens e utilidade de equipe repetível.
best_for: jogadores usando Font of Inspiration ou Unwavering Belief

steps.title: Adicione habilidades de Families quando sua família suportar uma rota especializada
steps.goal: Use habilidades exclusivas de Families como multiplicadores de build em vez de atualizações genéricas.

key_skills.name: Swift Strikes
key_skills.use_case: Uma versão Ackerman do Lethal Tempo que pode encadear todos os titãs ao alcance.

key_skills.name: Let it RIP
key_skills.use_case: Uma versão Ackerman do Torrential Steel com maior duração de giro e controle do cursor.

key_skills.name: Shifter Regen
key_skills.use_case: Regenera vida e ferimentos ao longo do tempo, útil para estilos de jogo de Titan Shifters.

key_skills.name: Potato
key_skills.use_case: Restaura uma parte da vida e dá aos jogadores Braus uma ferramenta simples de sobrevivência.

recommended_path: Trate as habilidades de Families como sinais de direção da build.
Use habilidades Ackerman para builds agressivas de abate em cadeia com ODM.
Use Shifter Regen quando sua família e configuração de Perks suportarem o combate de Titan Shifters.
Não invista demais em uma rota de Families que não combine com seu plano de Perks e equipamentos.
best_for: rotas especializadas de ODM ou Shifter

steps.title: Construa habilidades de Shifter em torno do tempo de transformação e dano a chefes
steps.goal: Use habilidades de Titan Shifters para pressão em Raids, controle de multidão e janelas de explosão.

key_skills.name: Corkscrew Punch
key_skills.use_case: Um ataque direto de Titã usado para pressionar titãs chefes ou alvos prioritários.

key_skills.name: Brutal Stomp
key_skills.use_case: Um ataque pesado estilo pisada que ajuda a controlar inimigos próximos.

key_skills.name: Uppercut
key_skills.use_case: Um ataque corpo a corpo usado durante o combate na forma de Titã.

key_skills.name: Roar
key_skills.use_case: Uma habilidade de Titã usada para influenciar o fluxo do combate próximo.

key_skills.name: Hardening
key_skills.use_case: Uma mecânica defensiva de Titã que aparece no jogo de Titan Shifters e no comportamento de chefes de Raids.

recommended_path: Priorize habilidades de Shifter se sua família, Perks e memórias suportarem o jogo de transformação.
Use Art of War, Founder's Blessing ou memórias focadas em Shifter para melhorar o valor da forma de Titã.
Em Raids, economize grandes janelas de Titã para fases de chefes em vez de limpeza de baixo valor.
best_for: jogadores usando Art of War ou Founder's Blessing

attackOnTitanRevolutionPrestigeGuide.name: Guia de Prestige de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionPrestigeGuide.title: Guia de Prestige de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionPrestigeGuide.subtitle: Prestige é o principal sistema de progressão a longo prazo após atingir o nível máximo. Ele redefine a progressão principal enquanto concede poder permanente à conta por meio de bônus, memórias, conversão de gemas e limites de nível mais altos.
attackOnTitanRevolutionPrestigeGuide.intro: O primeiro Prestige fica disponível no nível 100 com a barra de EXP cheia. Cada Prestige posterior aumenta o requisito em 25 níveis, e cada Prestige concede uma escolha de bônus permanente mais uma seleção de Memória de Prestige.
attackOnTitanRevolutionPrestigeGuide.recommendedActionLabel: Ação recomendada em Attack on Titan Revolution

steps.title: Alcance o nível necessário e encha a barra de EXP
steps.goal: Desbloqueie a opção de Prestige ao atingir o limite de nível correto.

requirements.exp_needed: Mostrado no jogo após atingir o limite do Prestige 4

steps.recommended_action: Não interrompa a progressão por muito tempo logo antes de um Prestige. Faça o Prestige primeiro e depois dedique tempo para farmar itens raros de longo prazo com os novos bônus permanentes.

steps.title: Saiba o que redefine e o que permanece
steps.goal: Evite perder progresso inesperadamente ao fazer Prestige.
resets: O nível do jogador retorna a 0.
A progressão da árvore de habilidades é redefinida.
As classificações de equipamento ODM e as classificações de Titan Shifters são redefinidas.
O ouro é convertido em gemas com base na taxa de conversão atual do Prestige.
keeps: Progressão de conta de longo prazo desbloqueada vinculada ao Prestige
steps.recommended_action: Gaste seu tempo final pré-Prestige em progressões que são mantidas e, em seguida, faça o Prestige quando o requisito de nível e EXP estiver concluído.

steps.title: Escolha seu bônus de Prestige permanente
steps.goal: Escolha o bônus que melhor suporte o farm a longo prazo.

boost_options.name: Bônus de Sorte
boost_options.recommendation: Melhor escolha a longo prazo para a maioria dos jogadores, pois drops raros e progressão de conta tornam-se mais importantes em níveis mais altos.

boost_options.name: Bônus de EXP
best_for: jogadores que focam em grind de níveis
boost_options.recommendation: Bom quando seu principal gargalo é a velocidade de nivelamento em vez de drops raros.

boost_options.name: Bônus de Ouro
boost_options.recommendation: Útil para o conforto econômico, mas geralmente menos valioso que Sorte para objetivos de itens raros a longo prazo.

steps.recommended_action: Escolha Sorte se não tiver certeza. Escolha EXP apenas quando estiver acelerando intencionalmente mais níveis de Prestige.

steps.title: Converta ouro em gemas durante o Prestige
steps.goal: Entenda como seu ouro se transforma em gemas ao fazer Prestige.
steps.extra_gem_bonus: +10 gemas para cada pagamento da AFK Zone após o Prestige
steps.recommended_action: Antes de fazer o Prestige, use ou converta seu ouro intencionalmente para que a redefinição ajude sua próxima build.

steps.title: Escolha uma Memória de Prestige
steps.goal: Escolha uma das três opções de memória para adicionar valor permanente à build.
memory_rules: Cada Prestige concede uma seleção de Memória de Prestige entre três opções oferecidas.
As Memórias de Prestige funcionam como bônus estilo talento e não podem ser compradas ou trocadas como Perks normais.
Memórias de Prestige duplicadas não se acumulam.
Sua árvore de habilidades atual pode influenciar o tipo de memórias que você tem mais probabilidade de ver.
steps.recommended_action: Escolha memórias que combinem com a direção real da sua build, como dano de ODM, utilidade de Suporte, segurança de Defesa ou desempenho de Titan Shifters.

steps.title: Use Pergaminhos de Prestige para trocar as opções de memória
steps.goal: Melhore sua seleção de memória quando as três escolhas padrão não se adequarem à sua build.
scroll_rules: Pergaminhos de Prestige podem ser usados para gerar opções extras de Memória de Prestige.
Pergaminhos de Prestige podem ser comprados ou trocados.
Após 20 usos de Pergaminho de Prestige, o resultado de pity concede uma memória de alto nível.
steps.recommended_action: Guarde os Pergaminhos de Prestige para otimização séria de build, em vez de gastá-los casualmente em pequenas melhorias.

steps.title: Planeje em torno das recompensas extras de Prestige
steps.goal: Use o Prestige como um sistema de poder de conta a longo prazo, não apenas uma redefinição de nível.
prestige_benefits: +25 de limite de nível por Prestige
+0,005% de chance de Families Lendárias por Prestige
Slots de memória gratuitos adicionais adicionados no Prestige 3 e Prestige 5
O Prestige 5 desbloqueia o nível de Prestige Capitão
steps.recommended_action: Faça o Prestige cedo o suficiente para começar a acumular bônus permanentes e, em seguida, foque no farm de itens raros quando sua conta tiver melhor Sorte, slots de memória e limite de nível.

attackOnTitanRevolutionRaidsGuide.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Raids Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionRaidsGuide.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Raids Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionRaidsGuide.subtitle: Raids are multi-phase boss fights with stronger mechanics, difficulty gates, and exclusive rewards. Learn the entry requirements, boss phases, Emperor's Trove rules, and what makes each raid different.
attackOnTitanRevolutionRaidsGuide.intro: Raids are separate from regular missions and focus on boss titans, phases, team coordination, and high-value drops. They can reward cosmetics, serums, artifacts, perks, Emperor's Trove loot, and raid-exclusive items depending on the boss and difficulty.
attackOnTitanRevolutionRaidsGuide.accordionLabel: Attack on Titan Revolution Raid Details

content.what_raids_are: Raids are boss-focused game modes split into phases. They are harder than regular missions and are built around major Titan bosses, mechanics, and reward chests.

difficulties.name: Hard
difficulties.recommended_for: First-time raid learning and lower-risk boss practice.

difficulties.name: Severe
difficulties.recommended_for: Stronger teams that want better rewards and harder boss patterns.

difficulties.name: Aberrant
difficulties.recommended_for: Experienced teams, best drop farming, and the hardest raid mechanics.

core_rules: Raids are usually phase-based rather than simple titan clearing.
Raid boss health, mechanics, and pressure scale with difficulty.
Raids do not give mission streak gems in the same way regular missions do.
Bring healing, resupply value, and players who understand boss mechanics.
A player must earn enough raid credit to open raid chests.

emperor_trove.purpose: Opens the Emperor's Trove chest in raids.
emperor_trove.why_it_matters: Emperor's Trove generally gives better drop chances than the standard raid chest.

structure.objective: Protect Eren's Attack Titan from incoming titans.
structure.key_mechanic: Pure titans pressure the arena while the team keeps Eren alive.
ODM users should focus the nape or skull critical points for high damage.

tips: Use the walls and outer space to avoid being overwhelmed by titans.
ODM users should prioritize weak-point access instead of attacking randomly.
Save high-damage skills for boss vulnerability windows.
Bring Support tools if the team struggles with injuries, grabs, or resources.

structure.objective: Defend rescue boats while the Armored Titan's Courage shield is active.
structure.key_mechanic: The number of boats and failure conditions scale by difficulty.

structure.objective: Defeat the Armored Titan after the shield phase ends.
structure.key_mechanic: Damage taken by the shield in Phase 1 affects the punishment going into Phase 2.

boss_moves: Shielded pressure during the first phase
tips: Prioritize boat defense before chasing boss damage.
Treat Earth Breaker as a major danger move and reposition early.
Coordinate damage windows after the shield phase ends.
Thunder Spear and ODM teams should avoid wasting burst during immunity or low-value windows.
best_for: players who understand boss phase timing

structure.objective: Fight Annie's Female Titan down to the phase threshold.
structure.key_mechanic: Use weakness marks and controlled damage pressure.

structure.objective: Fight Eren's Attack Titan during the middle phase.
structure.key_mechanic: This phase changes the target and removes the usual pure-titan pressure.

structure.objective: Return to Annie and finish the Female Titan.
structure.key_mechanic: Final-phase execution matters because mistakes can erase progress.

special_mechanics: No pure titans appear in this raid.
A tunnel QTE sequence can punish missed inputs.
Completing QTE inputs can support awakening and raid momentum.
Skipping or failing key sequences can cost a large amount of health.
tips: Use families and builds that perform well in focused boss fights.
Practice QTE timing before farming higher difficulties.
Bring high boss damage instead of pure wave-clear tools.
Coordinate Shifter windows for boss phases instead of using them too early.

structure.objective: Stall Bertholdt's Colossal Titan before it reaches the wall.
structure.key_mechanic: The Colossal Titan moves toward the wall while Eren is vulnerable. Cannons are required to damage the boss during this phase.
The Colossal Titan only takes damage from the nape during this phase.

content.win_condition: Keep Eren alive while completing the raid objectives.
content.failure_pressure: If Eren dies, the raid fails and the run can lose streak progress.
tips: Assign players to cannon duty during the first phase.
Protect Eren as the main win condition.
Save mobility and burst tools for nape access in Phase 2.
Use coordinated Support skills, healing, and damage buffs because this raid is locked to high-end difficulty.

notable_rewards.name: Colossal Serum
notable_rewards.use: Unlocks Colossal Titan shifting and can be used for trading.

odm_damage: Use Offense nodes for damage, critical chance, critical damage, and active attack skills.
Kengo, Black Flash, and strong blade or crit perks fit fast boss pressure.
Aim for weak points instead of spending time on low-value body hits.
thunder_spear: Use Thunder Spear-focused stats and perks when you want burst damage.
Maximum Firepower is the standout perk for spear count, speed, and spear handling.
Avoid wasting spear burst during shielded or immunity windows.
shifter: Use Art of War, Founder's Blessing, and Shifter memories when Titan form is your core damage source.
Save transformation windows for boss phases, not low-value cleanup.
Colossal, Attack, Armored, and Female Titan fights all reward good timing more than random transformation use.
support: Use Bandages, Portable Resupply, Red Flare, Black Flare, Order Advance, or Order Rage depending on team needs.
Font of Inspiration works well for team orders and flare-heavy support.
Unwavering Belief is best when the team can benefit from repeated party cooldown reductions.
defense: Use Defense nodes, Immortal, or health and damage-reduction perks when learning Aberrant raids.
Counter, Hardy Counter, and Emergency Relocation help prevent one mistake from ending the run.
Survivability is especially important in raids where a failed objective or dead teammate can collapse the run.

attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Titan Shifting Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Titan Shifting Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.subtitle: Learn how Serums unlock Titan Shift, where to farm them, and which Shifter fits your build. This guide focuses on Serum farming, Aberrant missions, raids, mastery, and Shifter roles.
attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.intro: Titan Shifting in Attack on Titan Revolution starts with obtaining a Serum, equipping it, and using the free shifting skill that unlocks with that Serum. Serums are Mythical items tied to raids, Aberrant missions, and trading, so raid farming and high-difficulty progression are central to every Shifter build.
attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.detailsLabel: Attack on Titan Revolution Shifting Details
attackOnTitanRevolutionTitanShiftingGuid.shiftersLabel: Attack on Titan Revolution Shifter Roles

items.title: Understand what a Serum does
items.summary: A Serum is the key item that unlocks Titan Shifting. After equipping a Serum, the player gains access to the related shifting skill and can transform into that Titan type.
details: Serums are classified as Mythical items.
A Serum must be equipped before the shifting skill becomes available.
Serum capacity starts at 1 and increases by 1 for every Prestige level.
The Serum gamepass adds 5 extra Serum slots.
items.best_for: Players preparing to unlock Attack, Armored, Female, or Colossal Titan forms.

items.title: Farm raids for the main Serum path
items.summary: Raids are the most direct Serum farming route because raid chests can drop Titan-specific Serums. Harder raid difficulties provide better Serum odds.
details: Hard raid chest: 0.03% Serum chance from the free chest and 0.06% from Emperor's Trove.
Severe raid chest: 0.09% Serum chance from the free chest and 0.18% from Emperor's Trove.
Aberrant raid chest: 0.20% Serum chance from the free chest and 0.40% from Emperor's Trove.
Emperor's Trove requires an Emperor Key and has doubled listed drop rates compared with the free chest.
Raid chest drops are affected by Luck.
items.best_for: Players farming Attack Serum, Armored Serum, Female Serum, Colossal Serum, artifacts, perks, and raid cosmetics.

items.title: Use Aberrant missions as an alternate Serum route
items.summary: Aberrant missions can also drop Serums, making high-level mission farming valuable for players who are not only farming raids.
details: Only Aberrant missions can drop Serums.
Shiganshina, Trost, Outskirts, Loading Docks, and Stohess list a 0.06% total Serum chance, with 0.02% for each individual Serum type.
Giant Forest lists a 0.07% total Serum chance, with 0.0233% for each individual Serum type.
Utgard lists a 0.05% total Serum chance, with 0.0167% for each individual Serum type.
Mission Serum rates are affected by Luck.
items.best_for: Players combining leveling, gold farming, Prestige Scroll farming, and Serum farming.

items.title: Meet the Colossal Titan requirements
items.summary: Colossal Titan Shifting is tied to the Colossal Serum and the Colossal Titan Raid. This path is built around late-game raid farming rather than early progression.
details: Colossal Serum drops from the Colossal Titan Raid.
The Colossal Titan Raid is Aberrant-only.
Players need Prestige 2 or higher to enter the Colossal Titan Raid.
Colossal Serum has a 0.20% chance from the free chest and a 0.40% chance from Emperor's Trove.
Colossal Serum does not work for Zoe, Ackerman, or Helos families.
items.best_for: Prestige 2+ players farming Update 4 Colossal Titan content.

items.title: Pick a Shifter that matches your build
items.summary: Each Shifter has a different combat identity. Choose based on whether you want raw offense, durability, flexible all-round play, or maximum transformation power.

shifters.name: Attack Titan
core_strengths: Berserk Mode increases damage and speed.
Hardening boosts punching and skill damage while improving defense.
Roar regenerates health and stuns nearby titans.
shifters.best_for: Players who want direct damage, fast pressure, and active melee combat.

shifters.name: Armored Titan
core_strengths: Built around durability and defensive pressure.
Uses tools such as Titan Toss, Earth Breaker, Courage, Phase Shift, and Unstoppable Charge.
Roar and defensive mastery support longer fights.
shifters.best_for: Players who want survivability, boss pressure, and tank-style Shifter gameplay.

shifters.name: Female Titan
core_strengths: Uses Grapple, Crimson Bloom, Hardening, Shriek, and kick-based attacks.
Mimicry can copy passive options from Attack, Armored, or Colossal Titan.
Crimson Bloom rewards aggressive combo play.
shifters.best_for: Players who want mobility, flexibility, and build variety.

shifters.name: Colossal Titan
core_strengths: Atomic Ascension triggers a Nuclear Shift when transforming at full awakening bar.
Walking can damage titans because of the Colossal Titan's size.
Skills include Atomic Ascension, Anguish, Tectonic Quake, Seismic Shock, Incendiary Volley, and Heatwave.
shifters.best_for: Prestige 2+ players focused on Colossal raid progression and high-impact transformation play.

items.title: Level Shifter mastery before building deep resonance
items.summary: Shifter skills improve through use, and Shifter mastery improves by taking damage while transformed. This makes repeated raid and high-difficulty play important after unlocking a Serum.
details: Most Shifter moves level up by being used.
Shifter Mastery levels by taking damage as a Shifter.
Boxing, Defense, and Fighting mastery level through punching.
Skills can normally reach level 10, and can reach level 13 when resonance is unlocked.
items.best_for: Players turning a first Serum unlock into a long-term Shifter build.

items.title: Use trading as a late-game shortcut
items.summary: Serums can be traded, making trading useful for players with enough Prestige and gems. This is especially important for players targeting a specific Shifter instead of farming random drops.
details: Serums can be traded to players at Prestige 3 or higher.
Each Serum trade has a 5,000 gem tax.
Trading is useful when a player needs a specific Serum for a build path.
items.best_for: Prestige 3+ players with enough gems who want a targeted Serum path.

attackOnTitanRevolutionArtifactsAndMemor.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Artifacts and Memories Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionArtifactsAndMemor.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Artifacts and Memories Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionArtifactsAndMemor.subtitle: Artifacts provide permanent bonus stats and special effects, while Memories act as Prestige talents that shape your ODM, Shifter, raid, and farming builds.
attackOnTitanRevolutionArtifactsAndMemor.intro: Artifacts and Memories are long-term progression systems in Attack on Titan Revolution. Artifacts come from raids and achievements, can roll bonus substats, and remain active even when Modifiers are enabled. Memories are selected through Prestige Scrolls and can define how much damage, safety, utility, or farming value a build gains over time.

items.name: Artifact Reroll Rules
effects: Artifact bonuses stay active even with Modifiers enabled.
Locking a substat keeps that stat unchanged but increases reroll cost by 50%.
items.build_use: Use rerolls to chase key permanent stats such as damage, cooldown reduction, control, speed, health, damage reduction, and Shifter-focused bonuses.

items.name: Crown
items.build_use: Strong general-purpose artifact for drop farming, Serum farming, perk farming, and raid reward hunting.

items.name: Scarf
items.build_use: Excellent for ODM movement, fast titan clearing, and aggressive raid play.

items.name: Scars
items.source: Armored Titan Raid and Female Titan Raid
effects: Reduces Awakening Bar drain speed by 20%.
items.build_use: High-value Shifter artifact for players building around Titan transformation uptime and Shifter damage.

items.name: Cloak
items.build_use: Useful for Shifter-focused raid play and players who want extra transformation availability.

items.name: Hoodie
items.build_use: Strong hybrid artifact for ODM, Thunder Spear, and general damage builds.

items.name: Rifle
items.build_use: Good utility option for missions and raids where refills and cooldown cycling matter.

items.name: Scorched Cloak
effects: Adds +5.0% Burn DMG on all attacks.
items.build_use: Built for Update 4 burn-focused and sustain-oriented Colossal raid progression.

items.name: Colossal Scars
effects: Reduces Awakening Bar drain by 20.0% for Colossal Titan.
items.build_use: Best fit for dedicated Colossal Titan Shifter builds.

items.name: Prestige Memory Rolls
effects: After 20 Prestige Scrolls, pity guarantees a 3-star or 4-star Memory roll.
items.build_use: Use Prestige Scrolls to chase build-defining Memories for damage, survival, support, or farming.

items.name: Quakestrike
effects: The damage bonus resets after reload, refill, shift, or eject.
The kill limit is 50 for ODM and 20 for Shifter.
items.build_use: Strong for long mission chains and raid phases where players can maintain kill flow.

items.name: Gambler
effects: Changes damage into a roll-based range.
Works as a high-ceiling damage Memory.
items.build_use: Used in raw damage builds, especially when the player wants stronger burst potential.

items.name: Furyforge
effects: Grants +0.4% damage for every 1% HP lost.
items.build_use: Powerful for Shifter and risk-reward damage builds that fight at lower health.

items.name: Thanatophobia
effects: Below 40% HP, grants damage reduction and other defensive value.
items.build_use: Useful for survival-heavy Shifter, raid, and difficult mission builds.

items.name: Tactician
effects: Increases support skill effects, duration, and radius by 15%.
items.build_use: Best for support-oriented raid teams and utility-heavy group play.

attackOnTitanRevolutionMissionsGuide.name: Guia de Missões de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionMissionsGuide.title: Guia de Missões de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionMissionsGuide.subtitle: Compare os principais mapas de missões, recompensas Aberrant, chances de Serum, chances de Prestige Scroll e valor de progressão. Use esta tabela para decidir quais missões farmar para ouro, EXP, Perks, Serums e Prestige Scrolls.
attackOnTitanRevolutionMissionsGuide.intro: As missões são o ciclo principal de progressão para subir de nível, farmar ouro, Perks, Serums e Prestige Scrolls. As missões de Attack on Titan Revolution incluem os formatos Skirmish, Randomizer e Special Objective, com cada mapa oferecendo diferentes objetivos, contagem de titãs, recompensas de conclusão e chances de drop em alta dificuldade.

items.mission_objective: Proteger o corpo da Titã Fêmea.
items.primary_use: Mapa de farm Aberrant de alto valor para ouro, EXP, chance de Serum e chance de Prestige Scroll.
items.aberrant_gold: 50.200 de Ouro como recompensa de conclusão
items.aberrant_exp: 9.132 de EXP como recompensa de conclusão
items.perk_drop_context: A chance de drop de Perk aleatório em Aberrant é de 1,5%, com a Floresta Gigante listando uma chance de 0,26% para Perk Mítico.

items.mission_objective: Defender o QG após a brecha.
items.primary_use: Missão Aberrant confiável para farm de progressão, rolagens de Serum e Prestige Scrolls.
items.aberrant_gold: 45.373 de Ouro como recompensa de conclusão
items.aberrant_exp: 8.254 de EXP como recompensa de conclusão
items.perk_drop_context: A chance de drop de Perk aleatório em Aberrant é de 1,5%, com Shiganshina listando uma chance de 0,23% para Perk Mítico.

items.mission_objective: Proteger o Titã de Ataque enquanto ele sela a muralha.

attackOnTitanRevolutionControlsAndOdmGea.name: Guia de Controles e Equipamento ODM de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionControlsAndOdmGea.title: Guia de Controles e Equipamento ODM de Attack on Titan Revolution
attackOnTitanRevolutionControlsAndOdmGea.subtitle: Aprenda os controles principais de Attack on Titan Revolution para movimento, ganchos ODM, impulso, recarga, corte, habilidades e jogo com controle. Este guia também explica o ciclo básico de movimento ODM que novos jogadores devem praticar primeiro.
attackOnTitanRevolutionControlsAndOdmGea.intro: O Equipamento ODM é a base do movimento rápido e do abate de titãs em Attack on Titan Revolution. O ciclo principal é simples: mire em um ponto de ancoragem, use o gancho esquerdo ou direito, dê impulso com gás, aproxime-se da nuca, corte em velocidade, depois recarregue e se reposicione antes do próximo titã.

items.title: Aprenda o básico do movimento no PC
items.practice_tip: Comece movendo-se pelo mapa sem atacar, depois adicione ganchos e impulsos assim que o movimento básico parecer fluido.

items.title: Use o ciclo de gancho ODM no PC

controls.input: Cursor do mouse / direção da câmera

items.practice_tip: Mire acima ou ao redor da nuca do titã, lance o gancho além do alvo, use o impulso para ganhar velocidade e, em seguida, corte ao passar pelo ponto fraco.

items.title: Use as teclas de atalho de combate e habilidades no PC
items.practice_tip: Mantenha as teclas de recarga, bloqueio e habilidades próximas na memória muscular, pois missões de alta dificuldade punem reações lentas.

items.title: Use os comandos do controle de Xbox
items.practice_tip: Jogadores de controle devem praticar a direção do gancho, o tempo do impulso e o ritmo de recarga antes de tentar missões Aberrant ou Raids.

items.title: Use os comandos do controle de PlayStation
items.practice_tip: Use o mesmo ciclo ODM do PC: gancho, impulso, alinhe com a nuca, corte, depois recarregue e se reposicione.

items.title: Aplique o mesmo ciclo ODM no mobile

controls.input: Use o arrasto da câmera para colocar a retícula no ponto do gancho ou no caminho do titã.
Use os botões de gancho e impulso na tela em sequência.
Use o botão de ataque na tela ao passar pela nuca do titã.
Use os botões de recarga e habilidades na tela entre os confrontos.

items.practice_tip: Pratique o ciclo de movimento no tutorial ou no Campo de Treinamento antes de farmar missões difíceis.

items.title: Melhore o Equipamento ODM para conteúdos mais difíceis

controls.input: Melhora o poder de abate de titãs.
Melhora o manuseio e o controle de movimento.
Melhora a capacidade de recurso de impulso.
Melhoram a consistência do dano e o burst.

items.practice_tip: Melhore o Equipamento ODM de forma equilibrada, pois conteúdos mais difíceis exigem uma classificação de equipamento mais alta. Uma prioridade comum de melhoria para jogadores de ODM é Dano, Velocidade, Controle, Alcance, Gás, Durabilidade, Chance Crítica e Dano Crítico.

attackOnTitanRevolutionTradingValues.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Trading Values
attackOnTitanRevolutionTradingValues.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Trading Values
attackOnTitanRevolutionTradingValues.subtitle: Check what can be traded, which Prestige level is required, and what tax applies before accepting a deal.
attackOnTitanRevolutionTradingValues.intro: Trading in Attack on Titan Revolution lets players exchange items, cosmetics, perks, artifacts, families, and Titan Serums through the Trading Hub. Use this module as a practical trade-check table before moving high-value drops such as Serums, raid cosmetics, artifacts, perks, or rare family rolls.

items.tradable_items: Access to the Trading Hub plus basic items and cosmetics.
items.trade_tax: Depends on the item category being traded.
items.value_check: Use recent marketplace listings and official Discord trade ads before confirming.
items.player_tip: Enter the Trading Hub from the main menu, 2D lobby, or 3D lobby. Confirm that both players meet the Prestige requirement for every item in the offer.

items.tradable_items: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythical, Leaderboard, event, and special cosmetic items.
items.trade_tax: Common: 37 gems; Uncommon: 150 gems; Rare: 300 gems; Epic: 1,500 gems; Legendary: 5,625 gems; Leaderboard: 100,000 gems; Nightfall or Mythical: 200,000 gold.
items.value_check: Compare the item rarity, event availability, raid source, and recent trade ads.
items.player_tip: Leaderboard, Mythical, event, and raid cosmetics need extra value checking because demand can rise above the basic tax number.

items.tradable_items: Special skins and gear such as Onikiri, Jotunn, Deus Ex Machina, Sunforge, Spirit, Onyx, Easter, and Aincrad gear variants.
items.trade_tax: Onikiri Attack: 200,000 gold; Jotunn Armored: 100,000 gold; Deus Ex Machina Female: 58,000 gold; Legendary TS Gear and Sunforge TS: 116,000 gold; Legendary ODM Gear, Sunforge ODM, and Spirit ODM: 174,000 gold; Onyx/Easter ODM: 90,000 gold; Easter TS and Aincrad ODM: 90,000 gold.
items.value_check: Check whether the cosmetic comes from a raid, event, battlepass, or limited source.
items.player_tip: Special cosmetics should be checked against live market demand because limited supply can make offers vary sharply.

items.tradable_items: Serums, shards, 2-hour Luck/Gold/EXP boosts, Emperor Keys, Prestige Scrolls, and crates.
items.trade_tax: Serum: 5,000 gems; Shards: 58,000 gold; 2H Luck/Gold/EXP Boost: 60,000 gold; Emperor Keys: 30,000 gold; Prestige Scrolls: 13,000 gold; Crates: 450 gems.
items.value_check: For consumables, compare supply and demand; for Serums and shards, check current trade listings before accepting.
items.player_tip: Emperor Keys and boosts are easier to price than Serums, rare shards, or raid-only items.

items.tradable_items: Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythical perks.
items.trade_tax: Mythical: 480,000-900,000 gold based on experience; Legendary: 140,000-280,000 gold based on experience; Epic: 72,000-144,000 gold based on experience; Rare/Common: 0.
items.value_check: Check perk rarity, experience level, build relevance, and current demand from players farming raids or Shifter builds.
items.player_tip: Price perks by rarity, experience, and build demand. Raid, ODM, and Titan Shifting perks usually deserve extra review.

items.tradable_items: Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythical artifacts obtained from raids or achievement categories.
items.trade_tax: Mythical: 200,000 gold; Legendary: 140,000 gold; Epic: 72,000 gold; Rare: 32,000 gold.
items.value_check: Compare permanent stat value, substats, reroll quality, and whether the artifact is tied to a raid drop.
items.player_tip: Artifacts affect builds permanently, so strong raid artifacts and clean substats should be reviewed before trading away.

items.tradable_items: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythical families.
items.trade_tax: Mythical: 50,000 gems; Legendary: 15,000 gems; Epic: 2,500 gems; Rare/Common: 0 gems.
items.value_check: Check family rarity, build compatibility, and whether the family supports raid, ODM, or Titan Shifting playstyles.
items.player_tip: Mythical families that support raids or Shifter builds can be worth more than the tax number alone.

items.tradable_items: Attack Serum, Armored Serum, Female Serum, Colossal Serum, and other available Titan Serums.
items.value_check: Check the Serum raid source, drop rate, current demand, and recent market listings before accepting.
items.player_tip: Serums are Mythical items. Compare several recent offers before trading one away.

items.tradable_items: Trade feedback and trade history are not tradable items, but they help verify past activity.
items.value_check: Review the other player offer carefully and use trade history after deals to track recent exchanges.
items.player_tip: The trade history system logs recent trades, and players can leave a review after a trade.

attackOnTitanRevolutionArmoredTitanRaidG.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Armored Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionArmoredTitanRaidG.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Armored Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionArmoredTitanRaidG.subtitle: Protect the rescue boats, break the Armored Titan shield, then finish the boss for raid chests and Armored Serum chances.
attackOnTitanRevolutionArmoredTitanRaidG.intro: The Armored Titan Raid was added in Update 2.5 and centers on two goals: defend moving rescue boats from titans and weaken the Armored Titan before the final boss phase. The raid has Hard, Severe, and Aberrant difficulties, with higher difficulty increasing pressure and chest reward value.

items.title: Know the raid objective
items.description: The Armored Titan Raid has two main phases: defend the rescue boats, then defeat the Armored Titan after his shield is gone.
details: Hard requires defending 1 boat.
Severe requires defending 2 boats.
Aberrant requires defending 3 boats.
The raid fails if 1 boat dies on Hard, or if 2 boats die on Severe or Aberrant.
items.player_tip: Assign some players to clear titans around boats while the highest-damage players weaken the Armored Titan shield.

items.title: Phase 1: Defend the rescue boats
items.description: During Phase 1, the Armored Titan activates Courage and gains a shield worth an additional 100% HP.
details: Defend the boats from titan swarms and the Armored Titan.
Damage to any shielded limb contributes toward Phase 2 damage scaling.
Every 2.0% shield removed converts into +1.0% extra damage taken by the Armored Titan in Phase 2.
The Phase 1 health soft cap prevents the Armored Titan from going below 75% red health during this phase.
items.player_tip: The better your team damages the shield in Phase 1, the faster Phase 2 becomes.

items.title: Phase 2: Defeat the Armored Titan
items.description: After the shield dissipates, the fight becomes a direct boss kill while pure titans continue spawning around players.
details: Focus the boss when openings are safe.
Keep clearing nearby titans so players are not grabbed or body-blocked.
Watch for boss movement and attacks while rotating gas, blades, Thunder Spears, or Shifter cooldowns.
items.player_tip: Clear nearby pressure before tunneling the boss. Stable team uptime matters more than reckless burst damage.

items.title: Open the correct chest
items.description: Players must have at least 5% credit to open raid chests.
details: Raider Chest does not require an Emperor Key.
Emperor Trove requires an Emperor Key.
Emperor Trove has 2x the drop rates compared with Raider Chest.
items.player_tip: Save Emperor Keys for runs where you consistently earn enough credit and are farming high-value raid drops.

items.title: Farm Armored Serum chances
items.description: Armored Serum is a Mythical Serum used for Armored Titan shifting and trading.
details: Hard: 0.03% from Free Raid Chest, 0.06% from Emperor Trove.
Severe: 0.09% from Free Raid Chest, 0.18% from Emperor Trove.
Aberrant: 0.20% from Free Raid Chest, 0.40% from Emperor Trove.
Serums can also be traded to players at Prestige 3 or higher with a 5,000 gem tax.
items.player_tip: Aberrant plus Emperor Trove is the highest listed Armored Serum chest chance.

items.title: Watch for the Jotunn Easter egg
items.description: The Armored Titan boss has a 10% chance to spawn with the Jotunn Armored skin.
details: The Jotunn set can drop for ODM or TS depending on the gear used when receiving the drop.
Jotunn set rate during a Jotunn Raid: 0.3% on Hard, 0.9% on Severe, 3.0% on Aberrant.
Luck can influence regular raid drops and the Easter egg equipment drop rate.
items.player_tip: If you are targeting Jotunn gear, run the raid on the highest difficulty your team can clear consistently.

items.title: Use raid-friendly families and builds
items.description: Raid pages recommend strong families or Titan Shifting for easier raid clears.
details: Recommended options include Ackerman, Shiki, Helos, Fritz, or Titan Shifting.
ODM damage against raid bosses was buffed in Update 3, while TS damage against raid bosses was reduced in the same balance pass.
Armored raid boat speed and boat survivability have been adjusted through later patches.
items.player_tip: Pick a setup that helps your team keep boats alive first, because losing objectives ends the run before rewards matter.

attackOnTitanRevolutionFemaleTitanRaidGu.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Female Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionFemaleTitanRaidGu.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Female Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionFemaleTitanRaidGu.subtitle: Clear the tunnel QTE, fight Annie, defeat Eren Attack Titan, then finish Annie for Female Raid rewards and Serum chances.
attackOnTitanRevolutionFemaleTitanRaidGu.intro: The Female Titan Raid was released in Update 3 and focuses on Shifter boss fights instead of regular titan waves. Players first survive Annie tunnel sequence, then complete three combat phases against the Female Titan and Attack Titan.

items.title: Understand the raid structure
items.description: The Female Titan Raid has a tunnel QTE section followed by three boss phases.
details: Phase 1: Defeat Annie by taking 50% of the Female Titan health.
Phase 2: Defeat Eren, the Attack Titan.
Phase 3: Defeat Annie again, starting from 50% health.
The raid has no pure titans and focuses on Titan Shifters instead.
items.player_tip: Prepare for boss mechanics and single-target damage instead of normal wave-clearing pressure.

items.title: Dodge Annie in the tunnel QTE
items.description: The raid opens with a quick-time event sequence against Annie in the tunnels.
details: Each missed QTE removes 10% HP.
Each completed QTE increases awakening bar by 10%.
Each completed QTE also adds 1.5 Undying Hero stacks for Helos users.
Skipping the QTE costs 60% HP.
Timing becomes stricter on higher difficulties, while the inputs remain left and right.
items.player_tip: Complete the QTE whenever possible so your build keeps health and awakening momentum.

items.title: Phase 1: Defeat Annie
items.description: In the first fight, Annie has body weaknesses and must be brought down by 50% HP.
details: ODM users should hit the nape or critical points marked by skull icons.
Critical points make the Female Titan take 3x more damage than normal body hits.
If Shifters are in the party, injuring Annie arms or legs can reduce her ability to hit Shifters.
items.player_tip: Prioritize skull-marked weak points and safe nape access instead of random limb damage.

items.title: Phase 2: Defeat Eren
items.description: Eren starts at 60% HP in the second phase and does not have weakness skull marks on his body.
details: Patch 37 removed vulnerability from the Attack Titan in Phase 2.
Patch 37 increased Eren Phase 2 health from 50% to 60%.
Attack Titan Berserk Mode adds pressure by increasing damage and speed when triggered.
items.player_tip: Treat this as a sustained boss DPS check. Avoid wasting burst windows looking for weakness marks that do not exist in this phase.

items.title: Phase 3: Finish Annie
items.description: Annie returns at 50% HP for the final phase and again has body weaknesses.
details: Use the same critical-point logic from Phase 1.
Coordinate cooldowns so burst damage lands when weak points are accessible.
Finish the raid by ending the Female Titan phase.
items.player_tip: Save a stable damage rotation for the final Annie phase so the team does not run out of resources after Eren.

items.title: Farm Female Serum and chest rewards
items.description: Female Serum is a Mythical Serum used for Female Titan shifting and trading.
details: Players must have at least 5% credit to open raid chests.
Raider Chest is free to open.
Emperor Trove requires an Emperor Key and has 2x drop rates compared with Raider Chest.
Hard Female Serum chance: 0.03% from Free Raid Chest, 0.06% from Emperor Trove.
Severe Female Serum chance: 0.09% from Free Raid Chest, 0.18% from Emperor Trove.
Aberrant Female Serum chance: 0.20% from Free Raid Chest, 0.40% from Emperor Trove.
items.player_tip: Use Emperor Trove on clears where you reliably hit credit and are specifically farming Female Serum or high-value raid drops.

items.title: Track Female Raid drops and Update 4 additions
items.description: Female Raid rewards include artifacts, cosmetics, auras, and the Female Serum, with Update 4 adding more Female Raid-related rewards.
details: Female Raid drops include Ring, Hoodie, Scars, Young Annie Attire, Young Annie Rain Poncho, Blazing Veil, Blue Lightning, Fractured Surge, and Female Serum.
Update 4 added the Deus Ex Machina Female Raid Easter egg with a 10.0% chance to spawn in place of the Female Titan.
Deus Ex Machina set drop rates are 0.3% on Hard, 0.9% on Severe, and 3.0% on Aberrant.
Update 4 Female Raid artifacts include Crystal Necklace and Female Scars.
items.player_tip: For rare cosmetics and artifact farming, run the highest difficulty your team can complete consistently.

attackOnTitanRevolutionColossalTitanRaid.name: Attack on Titan Revolution Colossal Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionColossalTitanRaid.title: Attack on Titan Revolution Colossal Titan Raid Guide
attackOnTitanRevolutionColossalTitanRaid.subtitle: Stall Bertholdt with cannons, defend Eren, then defeat the Colossal Titan by attacking the nape.
attackOnTitanRevolutionColossalTitanRaid.intro: The Colossal Titan Raid arrived with Update 4 and is built around an Aberrant-only raid flow. Players must protect Eren while using wall cannons to stall Bertholdt, then switch into a final nape-focused boss phase for Colossal rewards.

items.title: Check the raid requirement
items.description: The Colossal Titan Raid is an Update 4 raid tied to Colossal Titan shifting and Colossal Serum farming.
details: The raid requires Prestige 2 or higher.
The raid only has Aberrant difficulty.
Losing the raid causes streak loss.
Colossal Serum can be traded to players at Prestige 3 or higher with a 5,000 gem tax.
items.player_tip: Prepare before entering because this raid does not offer lower difficulty versions to warm up.

items.title: Phase 1: Stall Bertholdt
items.description: In the first phase, the Colossal Titan slowly moves toward the wall while Eren is vulnerable on the other side to titan attacks.
details: Eren staying alive is a win condition.
During Phase 1, the Colossal Titan can only be damaged by cannons.
Cannons are positioned on top of the wall.
items.player_tip: Split attention between cannon usage and protecting Eren. Ignoring either side can fail the raid.

items.title: Use cannons correctly
items.description: Cannons are the required damage source for Phase 1, so cannon uptime matters more than normal boss DPS during this section.
details: Players should rotate cannon positions to keep pressure on the Colossal Titan.
Non-cannon attacks should be treated as support actions during Phase 1.
Teammates not using cannons should help control titans threatening Eren.
items.player_tip: A clean Phase 1 usually comes from role discipline: cannon players focus Bertholdt, defenders keep Eren safe.

items.title: Phase 2: Defeat Bertholdt
items.description: After the stall phase, the raid shifts into a direct Colossal Titan boss phase.
details: The Colossal Titan only takes damage from the nape in Phase 2.
Players should position for safe nape access and avoid wasting damage on other body parts.
Burst windows should be saved for moments when the nape is reachable.
items.player_tip: Phase 2 is a precision-damage phase. Treat nape uptime as the main damage objective.

items.title: Farm Colossal Serum
items.description: Colossal Serum is a Mythical Serum used for Colossal Titan shifting and trading.
details: Colossal Serum drops from the Colossal Titan Raid.
Colossal Titan Raid is listed as Aberrant-only for Serum obtainment.
Aberrant Free Raid Chest chance: 0.20%.
Aberrant Emperor Trove chance: 0.40%.
items.player_tip: Use Emperor Trove when farming Colossal Serum because it has the higher listed chest chance.

items.title: Track Colossal Raid artifacts
items.description: Update 4 added several Colossal Titan Raid artifacts with clear stat bonuses.
details: Sleeping Mask: Epic face artifact with +2.5 Health Regen.
Sweater: Legendary back artifact with +10.0% TS Range and +10.0% TS Control.
Scorched Cloak: Mythic back artifact with +5.0% Burn DMG on all attacks, all Burn DMG multiplied by 1.1x, and +5.0 Health Regen.
Colossal Scars: Mythic face artifact with +15.0% Colossal Titan Stats, +1 Shifts, -20.0% Awakening Bar Drain for Colossal Titan, and Atomic Ascension range increased by 150m.
items.player_tip: Colossal Scars is the most directly Colossal-focused artifact listed because it boosts Colossal Titan stats and shifting uptime.

items.title: Track Colossal cosmetics and materials
items.description: The Colossal Titan Raid also adds cosmetics, a shard, and the Colossal Serum to the reward pool.
details: Cosmetics include Mushroom Cloud, Superheated, Aspiring Warrior Attire, and Atomic Bomb.
Colossal Shard is listed as a Legendary shard reward.
Colossal Serum is listed as a Mythic Serum reward.
items.player_tip: Cosmetic and shard value can change with market demand, so check current trading values before selling or swapping rare drops.

items.title: Use Update 4 Colossal Titan knowledge
items.description: Update 4 also introduced Colossal Titan shifting skills and resonance, which helps players understand why Colossal-related drops are high-interest rewards.
details: Colossal Titan skills include Footstep, Swipe, Eject, Shifter Mastery, Destruction Mastery, Atomic Ascension, Anguish, Seismic Shock, Tectonic Quake, Incendiary Volley, and Heatwave.
Colossal Titan resonance includes Evolving Havoc, Unmatched Devastation, Explosive Liberation, Infinite Chaos, Thermal Absolution, and Hakai No Kami.
items.player_tip: Players farming the raid for Colossal Serum should also track Colossal Scars and Colossal Shard because they support long-term Colossal Titan progression.

faq.title: Attack on Titan Revolution
faq.subtitle: Respostas para códigos de Attack on Titan Revolution, progressão, Families, Perks, Skill Trees, Prestige, Raids, Titan shifting, Artifacts, Missões, controles e links oficiais do Roblox.

questions.question: O que é Attack on Titan Revolution no Roblox?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution é um RPG de batalha de titãs de anime no Roblox construído em torno de combate ODM, Missões, Families, Perks, Raids, Titan shifting e recompensas de progressão.

questions.question: Como funcionam os códigos de Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: Os códigos de Attack on Titan Revolution concedem recompensas como Spins, Emperor Keys, Luck Potions, Gold Potions, XP Potions, Gems, Shards e moedas de evento quando resgatados no menu de Códigos.

questions.question: Qual Family de Attack on Titan Revolution devo manter?
questions.answer: Families de Attack on Titan Revolution como Fritz, Helos, Ackerman, Yeager, Reiss, Leonhart e Tybur são ótimas para manter porque suportam builds de alto valor de ODM, shifter, raid ou utilidade.

questions.question: Quais Perks de Attack on Titan Revolution devo focar?
questions.answer: Os alvos de Perks de Attack on Titan Revolution dependem da sua build: Kengo e Black Flash suportam dano de ODM, Art of War e Founder's Blessing suportam o estilo Shifter, e Font of Inspiration suporta equipes de raid.

questions.question: Como devo gastar os pontos de habilidade de Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: Os pontos de habilidade de Attack on Titan Revolution devem seguir o objetivo da sua build: Ofensiva para limpezas mais rápidas, Defesa para progressão mais segura, Suporte para utilidade em raid, habilidades de Family para rotas especializadas e habilidades de Shifter para tempo de atividade na forma Titã.

questions.question: Quando devo fazer Prestige em Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: Faça Prestige em Attack on Titan Revolution após atingir o nível necessário e a barra de EXP cheia, então escolha um bônus permanente e uma Prestige Memory que combinem com seu plano de farming ou raid a longo prazo.

questions.question: Quando devo começar as Raids de Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: Comece as Raids de Attack on Titan Revolution depois que suas Missões, controle de ODM, melhorias de equipamento, escolha de Family, Perks e caminho na árvore de habilidades puderem suportar lutas contra chefes baseadas em fases.

questions.question: Como desbloqueio o Titan shifting em Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: O Titan shifting em Attack on Titan Revolution começa com um Serum. Faça farm de raids, missões Aberrant ou trocas elegíveis, equipe o Serum e, em seguida, desenvolva a maestria de Shifter através de combates transformados repetidos.

questions.question: Quais Artifacts e Memories de Attack on Titan Revolution são mais importantes?
questions.answer: Artifacts e Memories de Attack on Titan Revolution importam quando combinam com seu objetivo de build: Luck para farming, velocidade e dano de ODM para limpeza de missões, atributos de Shifter para formas de Titã e Memories de suporte para equipes de raid.

questions.question: Quais Missões de Attack on Titan Revolution devo farmar?
questions.answer: Missões de Attack on Titan Revolution como Giant Forest, Shiganshina, Trost, Loading Docks, Utgard e Outskirts suportam farming de ouro, EXP, perks, chances de Serum e Prestige Scroll em dificuldades mais altas.

questions.question: Quais controles de Attack on Titan Revolution os novos jogadores devem aprender primeiro?
questions.answer: Novos jogadores de Attack on Titan Revolution devem aprender ganchos de ODM, tempo de boost, ritmo de recarga, tempo de corte, mira da câmera e controles de movimento específicos da plataforma antes de tentar missões Aberrant ou raids.

questions.question: Onde estão os links oficiais do Trello e Discord de Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: A seção de links oficiais de Attack on Titan Revolution inclui a página do jogo no Roblox, quadro do Trello, servidor do Discord, Wiki, comunidade do Roblox e canal social EvolutionPower.
